setup_task.sh script generation of TARGET_PIM with $(( ( RANDOM % 50 ) + 1 ))

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated data where setup_task.sh creates a VeraCrypt volume at /home/ga/Evidence/locked_project.hc using the password 'ProjectAlpha2024!' and a randomized PIM between 1 and 50. The verifier explicitly checks that the agent identifies this correct PIM (saving it to /home/ga/Documents/found_pim.txt), extracts the secret file to /home/ga/Documents/recovered_specs.txt, and mounts the volume at /home/ga/MountPoints/slot1.
